Wild blackberries edge the forest side of the Reynolda house lawn. Probably contaminated by any lawn treatments used. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: June-August.

One American persimmon tree. Persimmons are quickly crushed on sidewalk. But can find and eat some unharmed persimmons when ripe and falling -- in September and October. Around that time you'll also be able to spot the small persimmons in the tree many dozens
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Green (cooking) apples line the road at the Yadkinville Rd. entrance to Greenbrier Farm neighborhood. Not for eating out of hand. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
